title: Resolution Respectfully Requesting the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Suspend the Operation of Small Town Lottery (STL) in the Municipality of Los Baños Pending Inquiry on Collection of Remittances and Proliferation of Unauthorized or Illegal Stl Operations in the Municipality. (AUTHOR(S): Councilors Leren Mae M. Bautista,marlo Pj A. Alipon, Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Miko C. Pelegrina, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Benedicto S. Alborida, Gaudencio P. Macatangay, Jozyly
